description:
The Open Source Alternative To Notion.

AppFlowy is an open source alternative to Notion.
You are in charge of your data and customizations.
Version 0.11.7 – 07/04/2026
Desktop
New Features
- Added text and background color options to the slash menu
- Revamped the database Group By menu for better user experience
- Improved database loading speed via lazy hydration, inline fields, and incremental sort
Bug Fixes
- Fixed PDF export missing Relation field values in embedded databases
- Fixed pasting numbers with currency symbols or thousand separators (e.g. $1,234.56) into Number cells
- Fixed duplicating a view of an inline database producing a broken or misplaced copy
- Fixed filter panel dismissing when adding a new filter
- Fixed plus menu unable to replace an empty line when inserting an item
Mobile
New Features
- Added text and background color options to the slash menu
- Improved database loading speed via lazy hydration, inline fields, and incremental sort
Bug Fixes
- Fixed duplicating a view of an inline database producing a broken or misplaced copy
- Fixed pasting numbers with currency symbols or thousand separators (e.g. $1,234.56) into Number cells
- Fixed plus menu unable to replace an empty line when inserting an item
